expect: >=2 of 3 proxy chains show measurable proxy-target divergence (Goodhart cascade)
actual: CONFIRMED: 3/3 chains diverge (1 STRONG, 2 WEAK). Compound cascade detected: UCB1 volume loop feeds dispatch which inflates UCB1.
diff: Expected >=2 divergent chains, got 3. Chain 2 (PCI) is STRONG not WEAK — 2.2x gap between PCI (0.77) and actual quality (0.35) exceeds expectation. Structural finding: corrections are additive patches on multiplicative problems.

chain_1_dispatch_to_value.proxy: UCB1 score (merge_rate * log1p(lessons) * sharpe_factor + explore + modifiers)
chain_1_dispatch_to_value.mechanism: UCB1 exploit rewards merge_rate*volume. Soul boost correction structurally insufficient.

chain_2_pci_to_rigor.target: Actual scientific rigor (significance testing, external validation)
chain_2_pci_to_rigor.mechanism: PCI regex-matches field presence, not content quality. 85% have EAD fields, 9.8% have significance tests.

chain_3_utilization_to_knowledge.mechanism: High utilization inversely correlates with per-lesson quality.

compound_cascade.loop: Chain1 feeds Chain3: UCB1 rewards volume -> more dispatches -> more volume -> higher UCB1.
compound_cascade.structural_finding: Corrections operate at 10-15% of primary Goodhart terms. Additive patches on multiplicative problems.

prescriptions: PCI should include content quality (significance test rate, external citation) not just field presence
UCB1 exploit should weight human_benefit_ratio alongside merge_rate*lessons
Soul boost should be multiplicative (scale with exploit), not additive
Concentration penalty should scale inversely with benefit_ratio
